label: FIPS 140-3
description: NIST cryptographic module validation program
notes: CMVP validation will require PQC algorithm support. FIPS 203/204/205 already published.

label: Common Criteria
description: International security evaluation framework
notes: New protection profiles for PQC are being developed. Certification timelines vary by scheme.

label: ANSSI
description: French national cybersecurity agency regulation
notes: French regulation requires hybrid PQC for new systems. Full migration by 2030.
library_refs: ANSSI PQC Position Paper;ANSSI PQC Follow-up Paper

label: CNSA 2.0
description: NSA mandate for national security systems
notes: NSA mandate for U.S. national security systems. Aggressive timeline.
library_refs: NSA CNSA 2.0;NSA CNSA 2.0 FAQ;NSA CSfC PQC Guidance Addendum

label: eIDAS 2.0
description: EU Digital Identity and Trust Services regulation
notes: EU Digital Identity framework. PQC readiness expected for wallet implementations.

label: PCI DSS
description: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
notes: Payment card industry will follow NIST guidance. Monitor for updates.

label: HIPAA
description: US health data privacy and security rule
notes: Healthcare data has long sensitivity periods — HNDL risk is significant.

label: GSMA NG.116 / FS.40
description: GSMA PQC guidelines for mobile network operators
notes: Mobile network operator PQC guidance from GSMA. Covers 5G and beyond.

label: ETSI TS 103 744
description: ETSI quantum-safe cryptography for telecommunications
notes: ETSI specification for quantum-safe algorithms in telecom protocols.

label: DORA (EU Digital Operational Resilience)
description: EU financial sector ICT risk and resilience regulation
notes: Operational resilience requirements for EU financial entities. Crypto risk in scope.

label: SWIFT CSP
description: SWIFT Customer Security Programme mandatory controls
notes: Annual security attestation required for SWIFT network participants.

label: ISO 27001
description: International information security management standard
notes: Widely adopted ISMS standard. No explicit PQC deadline but requires crypto risk management.

label: SOC 2
description: Service Organization Control 2 trust services criteria
notes: Trust Services Criteria. Cryptographic controls reviewed in SOC 2 Type II audits.

label: GDPR
description: EU General Data Protection Regulation
notes: Art. 32 requires appropriate encryption. PQC becoming expected standard for long-lived personal data.

label: HITECH Act
description: Health Information Technology for Economic and Clinical Health Act
notes: Extends HIPAA enforcement. Mandates breach notification and strong encryption for ePHI.

label: FDA 21 CFR Part 11
description: Electronic records and signatures in FDA-regulated industries
notes: Signature integrity requirements applicable to PQC migration for regulated medical software.

label: FedRAMP
description: Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program
notes: Cloud service authorization for U.S. federal agencies. Rev 5 expected to reference PQC.

label: DISA STIGs
description: Defense Information Systems Agency Security Technical Implementation Guides
notes: Mandatory hardening guides for U.S. DoD systems. Crypto requirements updated regularly.

label: NATO STANAG 4774
description: NATO confidentiality metadata labeling standard
notes: Coalition partner interoperability requirements. PQC transition affects classified data exchange.

label: ISO/SAE 21434
description: Road vehicle cybersecurity engineering standard
notes: Full vehicle lifecycle security including post-quantum readiness. Required for new type approvals.

label: UN ECE WP.29 R155/R156
description: UN regulations for vehicle cybersecurity and software updates
notes: Type approval requires cybersecurity management systems and secure OTA update processes.

label: NERC CIP
description: North American Electric Reliability Corporation Critical Infrastructure Protection
notes: Mandatory cybersecurity standards for bulk power systems. Crypto controls in CIP-005/007/011.

label: IEC 62443
description: Industrial cybersecurity standard for OT/ICS environments
notes: Defense-in-depth for industrial control systems. PQC relevant for long-lived OT deployments.

label: DO-326A / ED-202A
description: Airworthiness security process specification for aircraft systems
notes: Aviation cybersecurity certification basis. PQC critical given 30-40 year aircraft lifespans.

label: RTCA DO-355A
description: Information security guidance for continuing airworthiness
notes: Supplement to DO-326A for operational phase. Covers cryptographic controls in service.

label: FERPA
description: Family Educational Rights and Privacy Act
notes: Student record confidentiality. Long retention periods imply HNDL exposure for sensitive records.

label: NIS2 Directive
description: EU network and information security directive for essential and important entities
notes: EU-wide cybersecurity baseline for essential and important entities. Member states were required to transpose NIS2 by October 2024; enforcement is now active across the EU.

label: COPPA
description: US Children's Online Privacy Protection Act
notes: Protects children under 13 online. PQC relevant for long-lived minor data and parental consent records.

label: TISAX
description: Trusted Information Security Assessment Exchange for automotive supply chain
notes: VDA-managed assessment for automotive suppliers. Covers information security including cryptographic controls.

label: MiCA
description: EU Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation
notes: EU regulation for crypto-asset service providers. Cryptographic custody and wallet security affected by PQC.

label: TSA Pipeline Security Directive
description: US TSA cybersecurity requirements for pipeline operators
notes: Mandatory cybersecurity measures for critical pipeline infrastructure. Covers encryption for SCADA/OT.

label: NIST IR 8547
description: NIST transition to post-quantum cryptography standards guidance
notes: Transition guidance recommending deprecation of 112-bit classical asymmetric algorithms by 2030 and disallowance by 2035.

label: ASD ISM
description: Australian Signals Directorate Information Security Manual
notes: ISM control ISM-1917 requiring PQC preparation for Australian government systems.

label: CCCS ITSM.40.001
description: Canadian Centre for Cyber Security roadmap for PQC migration
notes: Roadmap for migration to PQC for Canadian government systems.

label: EU Recommendation 2024/1101
description: European Commission coordinated PQC implementation roadmap
notes: Coordinated implementation roadmap for PQC transition across EU member states.

label: BSI TR-02102
description: German BSI technical guideline for cryptographic mechanisms, TLS, IPsec, SSH
notes: BSI technical guideline series covering PQC recommendations including ML-KEM and ML-DSA.

label: UK NCSC PQC Guidance
description: UK National Cyber Security Centre quantum-safe cryptography guidance
notes: UK guidance with 2035 deadline for full quantum-safe cryptography transition.

label: CRYPTREC
description: Japan Cryptography Research and Evaluation Committees PQC guidelines
notes: Japanese government cryptographic evaluation body publishing PQC guidelines and preparing detailed transition guidance.

label: MAS Circular
description: Monetary Authority of Singapore financial services PQC advisory
notes: MAS/TCRS/2024/01 requiring Singapore financial services to prepare PQC transition plans.

label: EUCC v2.0
description: EU Cybersecurity Certification Scheme Agreed Cryptographic Mechanisms v2.0
notes: EUCC Agreed Cryptographic Mechanisms v2.0 now includes PQC algorithms for EU cybersecurity certification.
